problem_statement: Given a string s , consisting only of characters 'a' , 'b' , 'c'.Find the number of substrings that contain at least one occurrence of all these characters 'a' , 'b' , 'c'.

examples.explanation: The substrings containing at least one occurrence of the characters 'a' , 'b' , 'c' are "abc" , "abcb" , "abcba" , "bcba" , "cba".
The substrings containing at least one occurrence of the characters 'a' , 'b' , 'c' are "ccab" , "ccabc" , "ccabcc" , "cab" , "cabc" , "cabcc" , "abc" , "abcc".
